claim_text: A prior evidence pack represented aggregators as roughly 75% of mobile orders in key UAE/Saudi ordering contexts and owned channels/call centers as roughly 25%.
audit_notes: The exact public source was not re-opened in this revision; do not reuse as a verified current market share.

claim_text: A prior UAE young-adult study was used to support that timely delivery and order accuracy are primary retention determinants.
audit_notes: Material direction is plausible but narrow sample and prior source should be re-opened before external use.

claim_text: Aggregator commission and platform fees can compress restaurant margins.
audit_notes: Direction supported by prior evidence; exact UAE commission rates remain vendor/contract dependent.

claim_text: Restaurant operators objected in prior evidence to losing customer data and control through aggregator channels.
audit_notes: Preserve as qualitative support, not a quantified market fact.

claim_text: Owned-channel orders can integrate with POS, order management, dispatch, tracking, or order-status systems when supported by the relevant vendor stack.
audit_notes: Supported as a capability claim, not as universal compatibility.

claim_text: Delivery/POS staging and API/webhook testing can validate technical flows but cannot by itself prove operational readiness.
audit_notes: Keep as audit interpretation; validate per vendor sandbox and live operating procedure.

claim_text: On-time delivery, first-attempt success, replacement handling, and peak-period performance were selected as candidate pilot gates.
audit_notes: Useful gate design, not an externally proven threshold.

claim_text: Direct-ordering tools can increase first-party data/control but still require logistics, payments, integration, and support choices.
audit_notes: Capability pages support pieces of the stack; economics remain unresolved.

claim_text: Aggregator and direct ordering can coexist; exact profitable channel-shift rates for UAE restaurants remain unresolved.
audit_notes: No current public source inspected in this revision quantified reliable UAE direct-channel conversion or substitution.

claim_text: Standardized rapid launch is a vendor-style capability claim, while POS, delivery, menu, payments, and local process setup introduce manual work.
audit_notes: Do not present rapid launch as universal.

claim_text: The prior record contains a tension between limiting customization for cost control and needing local personalization for restaurants.
audit_notes: Contradictory pressure preserved rather than resolved away.

claim_text: Low-ARPA SaaS businesses generally show weaker net revenue retention than higher-ARPA SaaS businesses in ChartMogul's benchmark sample.
audit_notes: Relevant as a support-load/churn caution only; not restaurant-specific.

claim_text: ChartMogul reports that only 2.7% of SaaS businesses with ARPA below $10/month had net revenue retention above 100%, versus 41.1% for ARPA above $500/month.
audit_notes: Use as exact benchmark with report limitations.

claim_text: Guaranteed ROI claims were prohibited in the historical commercial council artifacts.
audit_notes: Decision preserved; audit only checks evidence condition.

claim_text: Marketplace commission scenarios of 15%, 25%, and 35% were used as scenario inputs, not verified UAE restaurant contract rates.
audit_notes: Keep out of verified-fact language.

claim_text: Shifted-order scenarios of 2%, 7%, and 15% were used as assumptions requiring validation.
audit_notes: No inspected public UAE source supported these exact rates.

claim_text: Incremental-order scenarios of 0%, 2%, and 5% were used as assumptions requiring validation.
audit_notes: Do not state as expected uplift.

claim_text: Minutes-saved scenarios of 3, 5, and 8 minutes per order were model assumptions requiring validation.
audit_notes: Requires live pilot timing evidence.

claim_text: Mistake-reduction scenarios of 1%, 3%, and 5% were model assumptions requiring validation.
audit_notes: Requires live pilot defect-rate evidence.

claim_text: Stripe UAE lists domestic card pricing at 2.9% plus AED 1.00 per successful transaction.
audit_notes: Date-sensitive payment cost.

claim_text: Stripe UAE lists an additional 1% fee for international cards.
audit_notes: Date-sensitive payment cost.

claim_text: Stripe UAE lists an additional 1% fee if currency conversion is required.
audit_notes: Date-sensitive payment cost.

claim_text: Stripe UAE lists AED 60 per dispute received and AED 60 for manual evidence submission, returned if the dispute is won.
audit_notes: Date-sensitive payment cost.

claim_text: Stripe Checkout or Payment Links custom domains are listed at $10 per month.
audit_notes: Date-sensitive optional cost.

claim_text: Telegram Bot API cost was treated as zero for normal Bot API use in a prior ledger.
audit_notes: Not re-verified in this revision; keep out of current cost claims until re-opened.

claim_text: Tier 0 launch setup price was set internally at AED 2,900 and standard setup at AED 3,600.
audit_notes: Historical decision preserved; not a market price.

claim_text: Tier 0 managed monthly fee was set internally at AED 350, with optional client-owned support at AED 250.
audit_notes: Historical decision preserved; not externally verified.

claim_text: Tier 1 launch setup price was set internally at AED 5,900 and standard setup at AED 7,500.
audit_notes: Historical decision preserved; not externally verified.

claim_text: Tier 1 managed monthly fee was set internally at AED 650, with optional client-owned support at AED 450.
audit_notes: Historical decision preserved; not externally verified.

claim_text: Tier 2 launch setup price was set internally at AED 12,000 after AED 2,500 discovery, with standard setup at AED 15,000 after discovery.
audit_notes: Historical decision preserved; not externally verified.

claim_text: Tier 2 managed monthly fee was set internally at AED 1,100 and client-owned support was unavailable for the initial cohort.
audit_notes: Historical decision preserved; not externally verified.

claim_text: A cheap AED 300 WordPress/freelancer alternative was logged as an owner-objection hypothesis rather than a sourced market benchmark.
audit_notes: Do not cite AED 300 as verified competitor pricing.

claim_text: Manual WhatsApp and phone ordering remained a strong real alternative in the historical competitor ledger.
audit_notes: Needs current WhatsApp/payments/support cost verification for pricing claims.

claim_text: Delivery API and courier integrations were excluded from early core dependency and treated as integration-gated scope.
audit_notes: Decision preserved; current provider details remain incomplete.

claim_text: POS integration was not promised universally in the historical packaging decisions.
audit_notes: Consistent with current vendor-specific support evidence.

claim_text: Foodics displayed a QSR/cafes Starter Bundle at 423 per month, or 392 per month when billed annually, on the inspected pricing page.
audit_notes: Currency and final quote should be confirmed locally.

claim_text: Foodics displayed QSR/cafes Basic at 801 monthly or 742 annually and Advanced at 1224 monthly or 1133 annually.
audit_notes: Currency and final quote should be confirmed locally.

claim_text: Foodics displayed Cloud Kitchen Basic at 612 monthly or 567 annually and Advanced at 936 monthly or 867 annually.
audit_notes: Currency and final quote should be confirmed locally.

claim_text: Foodics displayed Dine-in Basic at 1183 monthly or 1096 annually.
audit_notes: Currency and final quote should be confirmed locally.

claim_text: Foodics package text listed API Integration in selected higher packages.
audit_notes: Capability requires package and implementation validation.

claim_text: Foodics Cloud Kitchen package text listed food delivery integration and delivery-zone features.
audit_notes: Capability requires package and implementation validation.

claim_text: Sapaad did not expose a fixed public package price on the inspected pricing URL and redirected to contact-for-pricing content.
audit_notes: Requires quote or updated public page.

claim_text: Wix Restaurant Website Builder claims support for online menus, reservations, payments, and one dashboard.
audit_notes: Not UAE-specific validation.

claim_text: Wix Restaurant Website Builder claims delivery integration, loyalty, marketing, and POS syncing capabilities.
audit_notes: Compatibility and UAE availability require account-level checks.

claim_text: Wix states that Wix Restaurants offers commission-free online ordering.
audit_notes: Commission-free platform claim does not include payment, delivery, or app costs.

claim_text: Wix pricing page displayed Core at $29.77/month, Business at $39.77/month, and Business Elite at $159.77/month on the inspected page.
audit_notes: Wix states prices and currency vary by location.

claim_text: GloriaFood displayed Restaurant POS System pricing at US$49/month/location with a two-year commitment.
audit_notes: Not a complete restaurant-ordering cost stack.

claim_text: Careem Express claims 30-40 minute delivery, advanced mapping and dispatch, and real-time tracking.
audit_notes: No price, liability, or SLA-remedy table found on inspected page.

claim_text: Careem Express states it operates in 11 cities across the UAE, KSA, and Qatar.
audit_notes: City-level coverage must be checked per restaurant location.

claim_text: Careem Express page offers delivery-volume bands of 0-50, 50-100, 100-200, 200-300, and 300+ monthly deliveries.
audit_notes: Intake form bands, not pricing bands.

claim_text: Deliverect says its Careem Express integration can connect Careem to an in-house order-management system and integrate online orders directly to the POS.
audit_notes: Requires Careem Express and Deliverect subscriptions.

claim_text: Deliverect says the Careem Express integration supports automated dispatch and real-time delivery tracking.
audit_notes: Vendor claim; validate operational SLA separately.

claim_text: Deliverect describes more than 1000 integration partners across POS, marketplace, online ordering, on-site ordering, third-party dispatch, and loyalty/CRM categories.
audit_notes: Broad vendor count; does not prove support for a specific restaurant's POS.

claim_text: Cloudflare Workers Paid plan has a $5 per month minimum and includes Workers, Pages Functions, KV, Hyperdrive, and Durable Objects usage.
audit_notes: Date-sensitive infrastructure cost.

claim_text: Cloudflare Workers pricing documentation lists KV and D1 availability on Free and Paid plans with included limits.
audit_notes: Exact quota planning requires current page review.

claim_text: Cloudflare Durable Objects are available with Free and Paid Workers tiers, with separate request/duration/storage pricing details.
audit_notes: Architecture-dependent cost.

claim_text: OpenAI API pricing page displayed GPT-5.5 at $5.00 per 1M input tokens, $0.50 cached input, and $30.00 output.
audit_notes: Date-sensitive AI cost.

claim_text: OpenAI API pricing page displayed GPT-5.4 at $2.50 per 1M input tokens, $0.25 cached input, and $15.00 output.
audit_notes: Date-sensitive AI cost.

claim_text: Exact UAE WhatsApp Business Platform pass-through rates were not verified from an inspectable public Meta page in this revision.
audit_notes: Resolve before quoting WhatsApp costs.

claim_text: Provider CAC, onboarding labor, support load, churn, and margins for the proposed builder model remain unsupported by public evidence in this revision.
audit_notes: Generic SaaS retention evidence is only a proxy.

claim_text: Restaurant ROI and payback for the proposed direct-channel package remain unresolved because public evidence did not verify conversion, substitution, labor saving, or defect reduction assumptions.
audit_notes: Requires pilots or narrowly matched primary research.

claim_text: Delivery-provider public pages inspected in this revision did not expose complete price, SLA-remedy, and liability terms.
audit_notes: Vendor capability evidence exists; commercial/legal terms remain incomplete.

claim_text: UAE-relevant POS integration support is vendor-specific rather than universal.
audit_notes: Matches historical decision not to promise universal POS integration.

claim_text: Current competitor and freelancer pricing remains only partially verified: Wix, GloriaFood, and Foodics anchors were found, but cheap freelancer pricing and full UAE agency pricing were not verified.
audit_notes: Use verified anchors separately from unsupported cheap-freelancer claims.

claim_text: Current domain, hosting, AI, payment, and WhatsApp costs remain partly verified: Stripe, Cloudflare, and OpenAI were verified; WhatsApp and domain/commodity hosting remain incomplete.
audit_notes: Do not roll unresolved items into a verified monthly cost.
